Items.name: Critical Hit
Items.tips: Attacks gain a critical hit effect, increasing damage chance

Items.name: Slow
Items.tips: Attacks apply a slow effect, reducing enemy movement speed

Items.name: Multi Target
Items.tips: Lock onto multiple enemies and shoot them at the same time

Items.name: Knockback
Items.tips: Shots apply a knockback effect, pushing enemies back

Items.name: Instant Kill
Items.tips: Can instantly kill normal enemies (ineffective against bosses)

Items.name: Damage Reduction
Items.tips: Reduce damage taken by the fortress

Items.name: Dodge
Items.tips: The fortress can dodge enemy attacks

Items.name: Damage Reflect
Items.tips: Reflect a portion of damage taken back to the attacker

Items.name: Life Steal
Items.tips: The fortress can drain a portion of HP from damage dealt

Items.name: Workers
Items.tips: Recruit more workers to collect resources on the battlefield

Items.name: Coin Gain
Items.tips: Earn coins each wave and after killing a certain number of enemies

Items.name: Gold Gain
Items.tips: Earn gold each wave and after killing a certain number of enemies
